name: Marshmallow Popcorn Christmas Tree
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the popped popcorn evenly in a jelly-roll pan or on a wax paper-lined counter.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine the margarine and marshmallows. Cook over medium heat until melted.
3. Add the jello to the saucepan; continue cooking until the jello is dissolved.
4. Stir in the green food coloring and mix well.
5. Pour the mixture evenly over the popcorn, stirring quickly to coat it thoroughly.
6. With dampened hands, shape the coated popcorn into a cone shape.
7. Decorate the tree with candy pieces.
